description: Tool availability after a complete tool-call/result exchange — does the model still emit tool calls on the second request?

messages.content: You are a coding assistant. Use tools to complete tasks.
List the files in the current directory.
The directory contains: main.py, test.py, README.md.

function.name: bash
function.description: Run a shell command; returns stdout+stderr.

function.name: read
function.description: Read a file; returns contents with line numbers.

expect.notes: Target quirk: Mistral-family models lose tool schema awareness after turn 1 because tool definitions are anchored to the last user message in the template — after a complete exchange, the new last user message lacks the schema. Failure mode: model responds with plain text ('I would read the file...') instead of a tool call. The pre-stuffed complete exchange is the trigger condition.
